title: Kaunas, Kaunas County — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kaunas, Kaunas County: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kaunas is a city in Kaunas County with a population of 295,269. Lithuania’s second city and a 2022 European Capital of Culture, known for its interwar modernist architecture, the Kaunas Castle, and a vibrant student life.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
